sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49338" key="qule/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θῡλ-έομαι</orth>, <sense id="n49338.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">offer in sacrifice</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀλφίτων ὀλίγας δράκας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:2:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.17</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θυηλήσασθαι</foreign> shd. be read in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
